nodes.name: test_engine_agent_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Tests for Engine agent registration and dispatch: verifies agent-by-player-id indexing, error on unset agent, single-choice auto-resolution without consulting the agent, and deepcopy preservation of agent routing.

nodes.name: test_evaluate_core.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the core evaluation module: covers summarize_eval statistics, evaluate_vs_opponent progress callbacks, and run_final_self_play_eval return shape against a live PolicyValueNet.

nodes.name: test_extra_play.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the extra-play credit mechanic: verifies the play menu is offered and completes the bird placement, handles the no-legal-play waste case, the decline path, and habitat-restricted credit filtering.

nodes.name: test_food_payment.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the food payment helpers (cost_meets and enumerate_payments): covers exact specific costs, wild substitution, two-for-one exchanges, free costs, overpay rejection, and multi-wild enumeration.

nodes.name: test_gain_food_choice.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the gain-food-choice bird power (food-choice and die-any variants): verifies parser recognition, no-collision with birdfeeder, correct agent interaction when food types are available or absent, and feeder refill on die_any.

nodes.name: test_habitat_action_track.py
nodes.summary: Extensive tests for all three habitat action tracks (forest/gain-food, grassland/lay-eggs, wetland/draw-cards): verifies count tables, trade-space gating, commit/discard/spend flows, and board render correctness.

nodes.name: test_inspect_era.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the run-era inspection and architecture diagram rendering: verifies static render output, frozen era widths, HTML/JSON descriptor round-trips, the inspect CLI, and error on missing descriptor.

nodes.name: test_instrumentation_config.py
nodes.summary: Tests for InstrumentationConfig serialization: covers model_dump, JSON, and YAML round-trips, default empty state, shared-instance behavior on build(), and correct nesting under TrainConfig.

nodes.name: test_instrumentation_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the instrumentation event dispatch system: defines a _RecordingHandler that captures all lifecycle events, then verifies correct event sequencing, decision filtering, uninstrumented-game safety, and per-handler open/close counts.

nodes.name: test_instrumentation_validation.py
nodes.summary: Tests for InstrumentationConfig validation: verifies that unknown handler classes, missing class keys, illegal event assignments, and references to undeclared handlers all raise validation errors.

nodes.name: test_main_action.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the main-action turn loop: verifies that all three habitat actions are always offered, play-bird appears as an option, play-bird opens a valid play menu, and the payment menu follows with cost-meeting payments.

nodes.name: test_metrics_log.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the metrics log reader: covers missing-file empty return, full row reads, fingerprint-based cache hits, cache invalidation on file growth, and graceful skipping of truncated final lines.

nodes.name: test_model_and_self_play.py
nodes.summary: Core model and self-play integration tests: verifies PolicyValueNet forward shapes and masking, single-choice handling, self-play record generation, gradient updates, per-choice feature sensitivity, family-head routing, card embedding sharing, and choice-candidate representation invariants.

nodes.name: test_move_goal_delta.py
nodes.summary: Tests for move-goal delta encoding in the choice featurizer: verifies bird-count, egg-count, set membership, habitat-spread bonus deltas, and that missing move context raises a validation error.

nodes.name: test_mp_collect.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the multiprocess game collection system (ProcessCollector): verifies games are collected with correct step counts, same-seed determinism, empty-seed no-op, and sequential/parallel evaluation parity against random and frozen opponents.

nodes.name: test_players_factory.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the players factory module: covers resolve_split_setup_bonus regime detection, split/combined flag gating, disagreeing-regime error, setup-decision top-option logging behavior, and probability floor for non-setup decisions.

nodes.name: test_players_spec.py
nodes.summary: Tests for player spec parsing: verifies human/random specs have no checkpoint paths, named specs resolve against the checkpoint directory, run-directory specs seat the last checkpoint, and .pt-path specs derive the setup-net directory correctly.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_activate.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird powers that activate other birds' powers on trigger conditions, verifying correct dispatch and effect application within the engine.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_bonus.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird powers that award bonus cards or scoring bonuses, checking that the engine correctly handles the bonus card mechanics.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_cache.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird cache powers (cache food/eggs on birds), verifying the item is placed correctly on the triggered bird and state is updated.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_discard.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird discard powers that require the player to discard a card in exchange for a benefit, verifying decision flow and state changes.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_draw.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird draw-card powers, verifying that the correct number of cards are drawn from the deck or tray and added to the player's hand.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_egg.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird egg-laying powers, verifying the correct number of eggs are placed on the correct target birds after the power triggers.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_food.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird food-gain powers, verifying that the correct food types are added to the player's supply after the power triggers.

nodes.name: test_powers_brown_play.py
nodes.summary: Tests for brown bird play-bird powers that allow playing additional birds at reduced cost, verifying the decision sequence and board placement.

nodes.name: _RecordingHandler
nodes.summary: Test-local instrumentation handler that records all lifecycle events (game_start, round_start, turn_start, making_decision, etc.) into a list for assertion; implements the full handler protocol used in dispatch tests.
